sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select	 
ap.id
,ap.BehaviorPlanId
,ap.Note
,ap.MemberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanid=bp.id   ) 	
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanNotesAudit t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.Note
,ap.BehaviorPlanId
,ap.MemberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanid=bp.id   ) 	
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanNotes t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null

inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id )

select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.behaviorTrackingId
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.[name]
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.baseLinePlan
,ap.ReviewNotes
,ap.NewPlan
,ap.baseLineStartDate
,ap.baseLineEndDate
,ap.baseLineNumberTimes
,ap.baseLineInterval
,ap.hasAssessments
,ap.hasFunctions
,ap.hasBaseline
,ap.FunctionNotes
,ap.NextReviewDate
,ap.manuallyEntered
,ap.FormResponseId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 

)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlan
 t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.id
,ap.childProfileid
,ap.behaviorCategoryid
,ap.name
,ap.definition
,ap.recordResultMethodType
,ap.intervalsOfMinutes
,ap.behaviorArchived
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.iep
,ap.iepGoalChange
,ap.iepGoalLocation
,ap.iepGoalCurrentLevel
,ap.iepGoalAnnualLevel
,ap.dateArchived
,ap.iepGoalChangeDefault
,ap.iepGoalLocationDefault
,ap.iepGoalCurrentLevelDefault
,ap.iepGoalAnnualLevelDefault
,ap.behaviorMastered
,ap.iepGoalStudent
,ap.consecutiveDays
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1

where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select t.Id
      ,t.BehaviorTrackingId
      ,t.LevelPosition
      ,t.Description
      ,t.DateCreated
      ,t.DateLastModified
      ,t.DateDeleted
      ,t.CreatedBy
      ,t.ModifiedBy
      ,t.DeletedBy
FROM @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} t
JOIN dbo.BehaviorTracking bt ON bt.id = t.BehaviorTrackingId
JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON bt.childProfileId = cp.id
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorTrackingIntensityLevels t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.*
ap.ID
,ap.SubscriptionID
,ap.TransactionDate
,ap.CreditCardTypeID
,ap.CreditCardNumber
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.FirstName
,ap.LastName
,ap.Address1
,ap.Address2
,ap.Address3
,ap.City
,ap.Zip
,ap.StateID
,ap.TotalAmount
,ap.TransactionID
,ap.ApprovalCode
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap
inner join Subscription s on (ap.SubscriptionID=s.id)
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.id=s.accountinfoId   )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_BillingHistory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  --ap.* --count(*)
ap.ID
,ap.BillingHistoryID
,ap.ProductID
,ap.ProductName
,ap.Desctription
,ap.Amount
,ap.Quantity
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.BillingHistory bh on (ap.BillingHistoryid=bh.id   )
inner join Subscription s on (bh.SubscriptionID=s.id)
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.id=s.accountinfoId   )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_BillingItem t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.StartDate
,ap.EndDate
,ap.StatusId
,ap.StatusMessage
,ap.LogMessage
,ap.BatchFile
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.SyncStart
,ap.SyncEnd
,ap.SyncResultTypeId
,ap.BatchResultFile
,ap.BatchTabDelimitedFile
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0

)t1
left join Temp_BillingSyncResults t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select --ap.* 
ap.childProfileId
,ap.assessmentAssessmentQuestionId
,ap.response
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.hcAssessedBehaviorId
,ap.TextValue
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileAssessmentResponse t2 on t1.childProfileId = t2.childProfileId AND t1.assessmentAssessmentQuestionId = t2.assessmentAssessmentQuestionId
where t2.childProfileId is null AND t2.assessmentAssessmentQuestionId IS NULL
select childProfileId, assessmentAssessmentQuestionId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.IsSkillAutomastery
,ap.IsBehaviorAutomastery
,ap.IsAutomasteryNotifications
,ap.IsBehaviorAutoswitchBaselineToIntervention
,ap.IsSkillAutoswitchBaselineToIntervention
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ap.ChildProfileId = cp.id
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileClinicalSettings t2 on t1.ChildProfileId = t2.ChildProfileId
where t2.ChildProfileId is null
select ChildProfileId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

ap.id

,ap.[start_date]
,ap.end_date
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.therapistId
,ap.memberId
,ap.dateCreated

,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.dateCancelled

,ap.sessionCompleted
,ap.sessionNotes
,ap.Duration

,ap.MethodValue
,ap.ModifiedBy

inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

select t1.* from (
select  --ap.* 
ap.childProfileId
,ap.diagnosisId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileDiagnosis t2 on t1.childProfileId = t2.childProfileId AND t1.diagnosisId = t2.diagnosisId
where t2.childProfileId is null AND t2.diagnosisId IS NULL
select childProfileId, diagnosisId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.firstName

,ap.stateTestNo
,ap.middleName
,ap.[address]
,ap.city
,ap.stateId

,ap.hipaaNopAgreement
,ap.clientId
,ap.healthConsiderations
,ap.Town

 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.ExternalMemberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.memberId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 			 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileExternalMembers t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --cp.* 
cp.id
,cp.childProfileId
,cp.accountInfoId
,cp.startDate
,cp.endDate
,cp.DateCreated
,cp.DateLastModified
,cp.DateDeleted
,cp.endBy
,cp.ModifiedBy
,cp.DeletedBy
,cp.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  cp 
 inner join dbo.ChildProfile c  on (cp.childprofileid=c.id)
 inner join accountinfo a on (c.accountinfoid=a.id)
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileHistory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.childProfileLessonTargetId
,ap.targetId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfileLessonTarget cpl on (ap.ChildProfileLessonTargetid=cpl.id   )
    inner join  dbo.IepObjective ij on (cpl.iepobjectiveid=ij.id   )
    inner join  dbo.Iepgoal ig on (ij.Iepgoalid=ig.id   )
    inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ig.childProfileId=p.id ) 
    inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileLessonSubTargets t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.StepNumber
,ap.hollowChildProfileId
,ap.hollowLessonId
,ap.statusId
,ap.[Description]
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateMastered
,ap.hollowDateStarted
,ap.levelId
,ap.IepObjectiveId
,ap.Active
,ap.selected
,ap.PretestSelected
,ap.DateMasterable
,ap.LearningProcessAttributesId
,ap.correctPromptId
,ap.IsMaintenanceOff
,ap.DateMaintenanceMasterable
,ap.DateMaintenanceMastered
,ap.ReintroduceTargetId
,ap.DateReintroduced
,ap.TargetVersion
,ap.Note
,ap.DateLastScheduleChange
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.IsMasteredManually
,ap.DateManuallyOpened
,ap.IsMasteredpreviously
,ap.IsAutomastered
,ap.IsMaintenanceAutomastered
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 
inner join  dbo.IepObjective ij on (ap.iepobjectiveid=ij.id   )
inner join  dbo.Iepgoal ig on (ij.Iepgoalid=ig.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ig.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileLessonTarget t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.curriculumId
,ap.levelId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted 
from
@{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 
inner join  dbo.Curriculum cc on (ap.curriculumId=cc.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (cc.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileRecommendations t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}
